title: Forgotten Horizons
description: this mod adds the farlands and the fartherlands to minecraft fabric 1.21.10
body:
- this mod adds the old style farlands and fartherlands, there are 7 stages to it
1. at 12,550,821 the original farlands start
2. at 14,050,821 the spikelands start
3. at 14,300,821 the patolands start
4. at 14,700,821 the decaying farlands start
5. at 14,850,821 the grasslands start
6. at 15,000,821 the void starts
7. at 15,010,821 the original farlands continue forever 
disclaimer it does lag the game a bit
